title: perularia scutellata
intro: Perularia scutellata is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, also known as the daisy or sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Perularia scutellata include relief from fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
